title: 打车去机场
prompt_en: Call a taxi to the airport. Tell the driver the address.
prompt_zh: 打车去机场，告诉司机地址。

title: 和司机聊天
prompt_en: Make small talk with the taxi driver.

title: 投诉司机
prompt_en: Call the taxi company to complain about a driver.
prompt_zh: 打电话给出租车公司投诉司机。

title: 约车去聚会
prompt_en: Book a taxi to pick you up for a party.

title: 说明来访目的
prompt_en: Tell the immigration officer why you're entering the country.
prompt_zh: 告诉入境官员来访目的。

title: 叫车去目的地
prompt_en: Ask the hotel concierge to call a taxi for you.
prompt_zh: 让酒店礼宾帮你叫出租车。
